## What does this change?

<!-- A sentence or two. Link a related issue if there is one. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Data (characters, media, locations, teasers, minigames)
- [ ] Images
- [ ] Code (site, API, FNAFDLE)
- [ ] Docs

## Checklist

- [ ] For data changes: ran `npm run validate:data` locally and it passes
- [ ] For data changes: sources are noted in this PR description (or already in the entry's `notes`)
- [ ] For code changes: ran `npm run check` and `npm run build` locally and both pass
- [ ] For image contributions: read [the image guidelines](../CONTRIBUTING.md#contributing-images) and
      the image is official promotional material, a screenshot, or my own photo — not a ripped/datamined asset
- [ ] Kept this PR focused on one thing rather than bundling unrelated changes
